content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


February 23, 2007

Robert Borrego
524 14th Street
Santa Paula, California 93060

RE: Your Letter of February 16, 2007
Our File No. 07-034

Dear Mr. Borrego:

     This letter is in response to your question in the above referenced letter concerning whether a public official is prohibited under the Political Reform Act from participating in certain actions regarding a development in your community. Because you have asked for an investigation into this matter, we have forwarded your request to our Enforcement Division. You should be receiving confirmation of their receipt of your request within the next few days.

     If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
